evals.prompt:
Generate API docs for this OpenAPI spec:
{"openapi":"3.0.0","info":{"title":"Users API"},"paths":{"/users":{"get":{"summary":"List all users"},"post":{"summary":"Create a user"}}}}
evals.expected_output: Markdown docs with H1 title 'Users API', H2 for /users, H3 for GET and POST methods
assertions: Output contains an H1 heading with 'Users API'
Output contains an H2 or section heading for /users
Output mentions 'List all users' and 'Create a user'
Output lists both GET and POST methods

evals.prompt:
Generate API docs for this OpenAPI spec:
{"openapi":"3.0.0","info":{"title":"Orders API"},"paths":{"/orders":{"get":{"summary":"List orders"}},"/orders/{id}":{"get":{"summary":"Get order by ID"},"put":{"summary":"Update order"}},"/orders/{id}/items":{"get":{"summary":"List order items"}}}}
evals.expected_output: Markdown docs covering all three path levels including the nested /orders/{id}/items
assertions: Output mentions all four methods: List orders, Get order by ID, Update order, List order items

evals.prompt:
Generate API docs for this OpenAPI spec:
{"openapi":"3.0.0","info":{"title":"Auth API"},"paths":{"/auth/login":{"post":{"summary":"Login with credentials"}},"/auth/logout":{"post":{"summary":"Logout current session"}},"/auth/refresh":{"post":{"summary":"Refresh access token"}}}}
evals.expected_output: Markdown docs for three auth endpoints, all POST methods
assertions: Output identifies all three as POST methods

evals.prompt:
Generate API docs for this OpenAPI spec:
{"openapi":"3.0.0","info":{"title":"Empty API"},"paths":{}}
evals.expected_output: Handles empty paths with 'No endpoints defined' message
assertions: Output contains 'No endpoints defined' or equivalent message

evals.prompt:
Generate API docs for this OpenAPI spec:
{"openapi":"3.0.0","info":{"title":"Events API"},"paths":{"/webhooks":{"post":{"summary":"Register webhook"},"delete":{"summary":"Remove webhook"}},"/webhooks/{id}/events":{"get":{"summary":"List webhook events"}}}}
evals.expected_output: Markdown docs for webhook endpoints including nested events path
assertions: Output mentions Register webhook, Remove webhook, and List webhook events
Output lists POST, DELETE, and GET methods

evals.prompt:
Generate API docs for this OpenAPI spec:
{"openapi":"3.0.0","info":{"title":"Streaming API"},"paths":{"/events/stream":{"get":{"summary":"Server-sent events stream"}},"/events/subscribe":{"post":{"summary":"Subscribe to events"}}}}
assertions: Output mentions 'Server-sent events stream' and 'Subscribe to events'
